3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<select class="event-filter d-none" id="event_type" name="event_type"> <option data-key="event_type" data-value="all" value="">Alle</option> <option data-key="event_type" data-value="barnas-bymuseum"
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<select class="event-filter d-none" id="suitable_for" name="suitable_for"> <option data-key="suitable_for" data-value="all" value="">Alle</option> <option data-key="suitable_for" data-value="for-barn"
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<select class="event-filter d-none" id="location" name="location"> <option data-key="location" data-value="all" value="">Alle</option> <option data-key="location" data-value="bergen-sentrum" value="49
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="required email" id="mce-FNAME" name="FNAME" placeholder="Fornavn" required="" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="required email" id="mce-LNAME" name="LNAME" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="required email" id="mce-EMAIL" name="EMAIL" placeholder="Din epost" required="" type="email" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input name="b_2e7de3d4d4e1bffbc19f7cf73_210c239da0" tabindex="-1" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'fname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="required email" id="mce-FNAME" name="FNAME" placeholder="Fornavn" required="" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'lname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input class="required email" id="mce-LNAME" name="LNAME" placeholder="Etternavn" required="" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="section-title"> Galleri </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="wp-block-heading">Bryggens Museum</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content

<a href="https://www.instagram.com/bymuseetibergen/"> <svg fill="none" height="16" viewbox="0 0 17 16" width="17" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="M8.27497 -0.000488281C10.4505 -0.00048828
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://mementor.no/wordpress-plugins/tekst-til-tale/" rel="noopener" target="_blank"><strong>Tekst til Tale for WordPress utvidelse</strong></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

🔄 Start ny skanning

https://bymuseet.no
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://bymuseet.no --max-pages 21 --format html
